behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction mentions renderPage, astro:html marker, queuedRendering, the expected unescaped <script> output, and the moduleId concept — all specifics asserted in tests are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and expected behavior without naming markHTMLString or the specific code path to edit.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only assert on rendered HTML output (unescaped <script> for .html pages, escaped for regular), not on internal helper usage; any correct fix producing correct output would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests call renderPage via Node subprocess and inspect actual rendered HTTP response bodies.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p test requires actual HTML string to contain '<script src="/assets/app.js"></script>' after renderPage execution — a stub cannot satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both behaviors (unescaped for .html pages, still escaped for regular) are explicitly tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively with docstrings distinguishing fail-to-pass and pass-to-pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is about HTML rendering, no structured data schema.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references the renderPage function and SSR runtime at an appropriate level of generality without naming the exact buggy line.
